ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the passenger (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Port of embarkation (1 for Cherbourg, 2 for Queenstown, 3 for Southampton) */,
  "title" INTEGER /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss.) */,
  "name_length" INTEGER /* Length of the passenger's name */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Family size (SibSp + Parch + 1) */,
  "fsize_d" INTEGER /* Family size category (1 for single, 2 for small family, 3 for large family) */,
  "ticket_captal" INTEGER /* Ticket capital letter category */,
  "fare_class" INTEGER /* Fare class category */,
  "cabin_class" INTEGER /* Cabin class category */,
  "age_class" INTEGER /* Age class category */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 for not survived, 1 for survived) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number (if known) */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time of boarding */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of disembarkation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare_class FOREIGN KEY ("fare_class") REFERENCES fare_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_class FOREIGN KEY ("age_class") REFERENCES age_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_captal FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_captal") REFERENCES ticket_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_title FOREIGN KEY ("title") REFERENCES titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_class FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_class") REFERENCES cabin_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation time */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Sex of the passenger (0 for male, 1 for female)
Port of embarkation (1 for Cherbourg, 2 for Queenstown, 3 for Southampton)
Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss.)
Family size category (1 for single, 2 for small family, 3 for large family)
Survival status (0 for not survived, 1 for survived)
Unique identifier for each embarkation port
Name of the title (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss.)
Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
